_comment: Task-type → file load order for Claude sessions. Each entry lists the 2-3 docs to read FIRST when picking up that task type. Built from docs/_meta/CONTEXT-LOAD-ORDER.md. Hand-curated; update when adding new task categories.

load: array of file paths relative to repo root, in read order

session-start.rationale: Active phase pointer + workflow instructions; everything else flows from these.

new-feature.rationale: Spec + ADRs to align with prior decisions, then current phase to scope.

bug-fix.rationale: Known fragile zones + actual current state of subsystems.

deploy.rationale: Runbook + reality baseline + fragile zones the deploy can disturb.

schema-change.rationale: Canonical schema + framework's data model + ADRs.

persona-change.rationale: Prompts directory + framework's persona system + boardroom-specific persona docs.

memory-system-change.rationale: Memory-system roadmap timeline + foundational constraints + framework spec.

research-or-audit.rationale: Prior research output index + raw research dir + ADR baseline.

doc-tree-migration.rationale: Migration map + live state + master execution prompt for the doc-tree consolidation work.

code-review.rationale: ADRs to flag re-litigation + fragile zones to flag risky changes.

phase-handoff.rationale: Active phase + per-phase progress + handoff format.

rollback.rationale: Deploy runbook (general rollback) + migration map §13 (Phase D-specific rollback variants).

test-debugging.rationale: Current state of the system + fragile zones + e2e test directory.

frontend-change.rationale: Frontend service rules + framework's UI references.

agent-runtime-change.rationale: Boardroom CLAUDE.md (agent runtime context) + ADRs (custom-runtime decision) + fragile zones.

validator-or-eval.rationale: Dev plan's multi-agent validation framework + eval directory.

first-time-orientation.rationale: All three orientation files in order — fastest ramp-up.

phase-e-cleanup.rationale: Migration map for stub locations + the tripwire test for Phase E cleanup gating.
